raw_text: mafalda soares (386) 301-7212 mafalda.mafaldex@gmail.com education project experience work experience skills involvement awards embry-riddle aeronautical university daytona beach, fl major: aerospace engineering expected graduation: may 2022 area of concentration: aeronautics gpa: 3.74/4.0 minor: computational mathematics embry-riddle design of a close air support supersonic jet fall 2021 part of a team that designed and created a reliable aircraft that would meet the requirements of a close air support mission. all the requirements were met, and the aircraft proved to be stable, controllable and adaptable. embry-riddle development of uav for dynamic soaring research spring-summer 2021 member of a research team to develop a dynamic-soaring capable unmanned aerial vehicle (uav) optimized for long-duration flight with minimal on-board power consumption. embry-riddle design of the internal structure of an aircraft wing spring 2022 member of a team that designed and sized the internal structure of a wing using structural and fatigue analysis considering the loads and forces applied as well as the manufacturers needs. embry-riddle research for uncertain multiagent systems spring 2022-present worked with dr. kadriye merve dogan and other embry-riddle students in a research project funded by the national aeronautics and space administration to develop a resilient distributed control of multiple spacecraft for future cooperative space exploration embry-riddle study mentor, tutor and grader spring 2020-present tutored mathematics for the a? program at embry-riddle for multiple majors. in addition, mentored and tutored student athletes at eagle study connections. assisted with grading for professor glenn greiner, program coordinator for the bachelors in aerospace engineering at embry-riddle, for the class of aircraft stability and control. also assisted dr. moncayo, associate professor at embry-riddle for the same class. engineering software: catia v.5, matlab, simulink, autocad, python, femap, surfaces office software: microsoft word, excel, powerpoint languages: english (fluent), spanish (fluent), portuguese (fluent), french (basic) player in the womens tennis team of embry-riddle fall 2018-spring 2022 member of society for industrial and applied mathematics fall 2020-present involved in the tennis team community service program fall 2018-spring 2022 erau deans list fall 2018-spring 2022 ssc commissioners honor roll spring 2019-2022 women of excellence award fall 2018-spring 2022 womens tennis athletic grant fall 2018-spring 2022
